programme.title: Great Chocolate Showdown
programme.sub-title: Where There's a Whisk, There's a Way
programme.desc: The nine home bakers use chocolate to create playful vessels to hold their desserts in their Technique Test; in the Elimination Challenge, the bakers are surprised with two mystery ingredients they must masterfully whisk into a chocolate dessert.

programme.sub-title: Where There's a Whisk, There's a Way

programme.desc: John's Okanagan-bound for a unique brunch experience in Kelowna, BC to try an incredible peanut butter and scrambled egg combo; John jets off to Edmonton, AB to get a taste of hand-made pretzels topped with spicy scallion and cheesy mozzarella.

programme.title: Global National

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Sharyn Alfonsi, Anderson Cooper, Steve Kroft, Lara Logan, Norah O'Donnell, Scott Pelley, Charlie Rose, Lesley Stahl, Jon Wertheim, Oprah Winfrey and Bill Whitaker.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Sharyn Alfonsi, Anderson Cooper, Steve Kroft, Lara Logan, Norah O'Donnell, Scott Pelley, Charlie Rose, Lesley Stahl, Jon Wertheim, Oprah Winfrey and Bill Whitaker.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a petty officer's death is connected to a blackmail investigation, the team is forced to work with Special Agent Sawyer on the case, which takes a terrifying turn for Torres.
